zero 0.3.4
build: 5b3a90a
release: v0.3.4 (2026-06-13T16:54:57Z)
host: linux-x64
binary-sha256: 84a3c79d482260ee15660a49fc6b904afc927a230d05a4263039dd4dd1360e87
source: gh release download v0.3.4 --repo vercel-labs/zero --pattern zero-linux-x64

note: Zero 0.3.4 is the first tagged release the index vendors past the
0.1.2 commit-pin. The native bootstrap surface changed substantially from
0.1.2: two new skills (graph, zero), a graph-first authoring CLI (patch,
query, view, diff, reconcile, merge, import/export), and a much larger
stdlib skill (~44KB vs ~2.7KB). Skill names are now bare (language, not
zero-language). This directory snapshots `zero skills get <name> --json`
for all nine 0.3.4 skills plus the extracted markdown. Re-snapshot on the
next tagged release.
